$comment: Known external-infrastructure SDK families grouped by seam. Detect matches a target's package.json dependencies and import specifiers against these prefixes. This is a representative starter list, not an exhaustive registry — extend it per ecosystem. Names here are neutral examples of interchangeable providers.

data-store.description: SQL/Postgres client drivers and hosted-Postgres SDKs. The interface over these makes any Postgres host swappable.

auth-identity.description: Auth / identity provider SDKs. The app owns its session lifecycle; the upstream identity provider stays pluggable.

queue-eventbus.description: Queues / pub-sub / message brokers for out-of-process fan-out.

http-runtime.description: Deployment-runtime bindings that couple the HTTP entry point to one host. Keep the app a runtime-agnostic handler; each target is a thin composition-root entry.
